evidence.snippet: NDAA-compliant, Blue UAS listed flight controllers, GPS modules, and sensors — designed for defense, commercial, and research applications.
Blue Framework Listed, USA built, NDAA compliant flight controller based on the FMUV6X and Pixhawk Autopilot Bus open source standards with triple synced IMUs.

items.notes: Flight controllers are the flagship product line: ARKV6X, ARK FPV, ARK Pi6X, ARK Pi6X Flow, ARK Pixhawk PAB Carrier, ARK Jetson PAB Carrier.

evidence.snippet: *   Salt Lake City, UT USA

Founded in 2018, ARK Electronics is dedicated to designing and manufacturing high-quality, **made-in-the-USA** drone and robotics electronics. We specialize in cutting-edge, NDAA-compliant components trusted for professional, commercial, and defense applications, including flight controllers, GPS modules, optical flow and distance sensors, rangefinders, power modules, and inertial measurement units.
Blue Framework Listed, USA built, NDAA compliant flight controller based on the FMUV6X and Pixhawk Autopilot Bus open source standards with triple synced IMUs.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs and manufactures autopilots, GPS modules, IMUs, ESCs, and power modules — all major drone subsystems sold to OEMs, integrators, and defense programs. Does not build complete drone platforms.

NDAA-compliant, Blue UAS listed flight controllers, GPS modules, and sensors — designed for defense, commercial, and research applications.

Founded in 2018, ARK Electronics is dedicated to designing and manufacturing high-quality, **made-in-the-USA** drone and robotics electronics. We specialize in cutting-edge, NDAA-compliant components trusted for professional, commercial, and defense applications, including flight controllers, GPS modules, optical flow and distance sensors, rangefinders, power modules, and inertial measurement units.
*   NDAA compliant

ndaa.notes: Site explicitly and repeatedly claims NDAA compliance for flight controllers, GPS, sensors, and bundles. Dedicated NDAA product category page. Products tagged 'ndaa compliant'.

evidence.snippet: [![Made in USA](https://arkelectron.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/american-flag-2144392_1280-300x158.png) Made in USA](https://arkelectron.com "Made in USA")[![NDAA Compliant](https://arkelectron.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/NDAA_logo_HQ_1-300x273-1.png) NDAA Compliant ](https://arkelectron.com/ndaa-compliant/ "NDAA Compliant")[![Blue UAS Listed](https://arkelectron.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/Large_Blue_UAS_Logo_Plain-1024x512.jpg) Blue UAS Listed ](https://bluelist.appsplatformportals.us/Framework/ "Blue UAS Listed")[![Dronecode Foundation Member](https://arkelectron.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/dronecode_logo_default-2.png) Dronecode Member ](https://dronecode.org/welcome-ark-electronics-as-a-silver-member/ "Dronecode Foundation Member")[![ArduPilot Partner](https://arkelectron.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/ArduPilot-Cleaned-Transparent.png) ArduPilot Partner ](https://ardupilot.org/ardupilot/docs/common-partners.html "ArduPilot Partner")[![47G Utah Aerospace & Defense](https://arkelectron.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/47g-1024x227.png) 47G Member](https://www.47g.org/members/ark-electronics/ "47G Member")

All of our products are proudly designed, manufactured, and tested in the United States. This commitment to American manufacturing ensures superior quality control, a resilient domestic supply chain, and support for U.S. jobs and innovation. Many of our solutions are listed on the DIU Blue UAS Framework, making them ideal for government and mission-critical programs.
*   [Blue Framework Listed](https://www.diu.mil/blue-uas/framework)

blue_uas.notes: Homepage has 'Blue UAS Listed' badge with link to DIU Blue UAS Framework. About page states many products listed on DIU Blue UAS Framework. ARKV6X explicitly tagged 'Blue Framework Listed'.

readiness.notes: Products listed with prices, SKUs, and in-stock quantities. 381 units in stock for ARKV6X alone. Multiple product categories with consistent pricing and add-to-cart functionality.

tagline: Flight controllers, autopilot carriers, and sensor modules (GPS, IMU, optical flow, ESCs, power distribution) for small unmanned systems. NDAA-compliant and Blue UAS listed. Salt Lake City-based subsystem supplier with broad product range across vehicle control, navigation, and avionics integration; limited public evidence of fielded programs or production volumes.
